title: いつでもどこでも輝くよ☆

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I finish work after classes are over. As I'm heading
home, I hear someone singing from somewhere...

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
One, two, three, to stage left! ♪ Four, five, six,
to stage right! ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I turn in the direction of the voice and find that
the lights in the dance studio are still on.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Okay, I think I'm getting there! Gonna take it
from the top! Let's go! ♪

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Sorry to intrude.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Oh, Oguri! Are you here to practice too?!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Uh, no, I'm supposed to lock up, actually...

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: What?! Is it seriously that late already?!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
But... but there's still stuff I want to work on!
There's not long left till I'll have to perform for
real!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Please, please, please! Can you wait just a teensy
bit longer?!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Hm... Fine. But only a little bit.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
And now I do a... perfect turn! ♪ Ooh, yeah,
that's good! ☆

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: What do you think, Oguri? Like my performance?

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Hmm, I think I've heard this song before...

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: That's not what I asked!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Oh, yeah... I do know this song. I danced to it in my hometown a long time ago.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Oh, right! You're from the countryside, aren't
you, Oguri?

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
My next race is in the countryside, actually. That's
what I'm practicing for!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Everyone learns the central songs in school, but
you've gotta learn the regional ones yourself!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: I see... You're really passionate, Falco.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Even when I used to run in the countryside, there
weren't many runners who took the winning
concert that seriously.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Yeah, I bet. But I'm an Umadol, after all!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
I do it for everyone who's always supported me
and for those who are going to be my new fans!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
I always give them the best performance I can!
And always with a big smile! ☆

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
You're amazing... I think I could learn a lot from
your passion.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Really?! Then why not try to become an Umadol
too? ♪

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Umadol or not, this'll be a good chance to
improve my stage presence.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: However, it really is time to close up the studio.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Umm, do you think it'd be possible to stay just a
liiittle longer, huh? ☆

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: I dunno. The teacher'll get mad if I don't lock up.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Don't worry about that! Please, the race is almost
here! I just need a teeny bit longer!
